title: Module Title
subtitle: One-sentence hook that makes the learner want to read further.
objectives: Objective 1 — starts with a verb (Understand, Build, Configure, Implement)
intro: 2–3 paragraphs introducing the module. Use bold for key terms. Reference the Prior Authorization domain. Explain WHY this topic matters before diving into HOW.

concepts.title: Concept 1 Title
concepts.body: Explanation with inline code for class names, annotations, methods. Keep paragraphs short. Use the Prior Authorization domain for all examples.

comingFrom.java: How you'd solve this in plain Java without Spring — e.g., manual servlet config, JDBC boilerplate, hand-rolled connection pools.
comingFrom.context: What Spring automates and why — the value proposition mapped to what the learner already knows.
